title: agathosma linifolia
intro: Agathosma linifolia, also known as buchu or round buchu, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rutaceae. It is native to South Africa and has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include its ability to act as a diuretic and anti-inflammatory. The health benefits of Agathosma linifolia include its potential to reduce urinary tract infections, alleviate symptoms of kidney stones, and provide relief from rheumatism and arthritis. Agathosma linifolia is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and capsules, and can be found in some commercial products, including dietary supplements and skincare products.
